description: Full Chat OS for Slack: escalation, multi-agent sessions, media pipeline, custom commands, and proactive suggestions. Push AoA notifications, receive slash commands, and manage agent workflows.

capabilityDescriptions.companies.read: Read AoA company data for per-company Slack channel routing
capabilityDescriptions.issues.read: Read AoA tasks to post notifications to Slack channels
capabilityDescriptions.issues.create: Create AoA tasks from Slack slash commands and messages
capabilityDescriptions.agents.read: Read AoA agent data for multi-agent Slack session routing
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.create: Start multi-agent working sessions from Slack threads
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.send: Send messages into active agent sessions from Slack
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.close: Close multi-agent sessions and post summaries to Slack
capabilityDescriptions.agents.invoke: Invoke AoA agents with context assembled from Slack threads
capabilityDescriptions.events.subscribe: Subscribe to AoA events to push Slack channel notifications
capabilityDescriptions.events.emit: Emit AoA events from Slack actions and slash commands
capabilityDescriptions.plugin.state.read: Read persisted state for channel mappings and session tracking
capabilityDescriptions.plugin.state.write: Write persisted state for channel mappings and session tracking
capabilityDescriptions.http.outbound: Send HTTPS requests to Slack API endpoints
capabilityDescriptions.secrets.read-ref: Resolve Slack Bot Token and Signing Secret references at runtime
capabilityDescriptions.webhooks.receive: Receive inbound payloads from Slack Events API and slash commands
capabilityDescriptions.instance.settings.register: Register Slack token and signing secret configuration schema
capabilityDescriptions.activity.log.write: Log Slack interaction events to the AoA activity feed
capabilityDescriptions.metrics.write: Record Slack message and session metrics for dashboards
capabilityDescriptions.jobs.schedule: Schedule recurring Slack digest and proactive suggestion jobs
capabilityDescriptions.agent.tools.register: Register Slack-specific tools available to AoA agents
